intended_use: AI-Rad Companion Organs RT is a post-processing software intended to automatically contour DICOM CT and MR pre-defined structures using deep-learning-based algorithms. Contours that are generated by A
intended_use_full: AI-Rad Companion Organs RT is a post-processing software intended to automatically contour DICOM CT and MR pre-defined structures using deep-learning-based algorithms. Contours that are generated by AI-Rad Companion Organs RT may be used as input for clinical workflows including external beam radiation therapy treatment planning. AI-Rad Companion Organs RT must be used in conjunction with appropriate software such as Treatment Planning Systems and Interactive Contouring applications, to review, edit, and accept contours generated by AI-Rad Companion Organs RT. The outputs of AI-Rad Companion Organs RT are intended to be used by trained medical professionals. The software is not intended to automatically detect or contour lesions.
target_condition: Patients previously selected for radiation therapy requiring organ delineation for dosimetry planning
ground_truth: Manual annotations by experienced annotators mentored by radiologists or radiation oncologists, with quality assessment and correction performed by board-certified radiation oncologist using validated medical image annotation tools, following RTOG and clinical guidelines
other_metrics: Dice coefficient (range 38.3-95.2%), Absolute Symmetric Surface Distance (ASSD in mm, range 0.5-5.3 mm), Fail rate
